name: Lucor
description: BlueStamp Health (bluestamp.ai) is an AI-powered intelligence platform helping health plans and their partners fight medical fraud, waste, and abuse (FWA). name: HeyOpal
description: We connect the dots in mental healthcare by unifying its landscape around the client. We give clients agency to inform their treatment, and support clinicians to deliver high-quality, scalable care by making communication more effective. We help progress continue between sessions using clinician-driven conversational AI interventions to promote higher engagement, retention, and ultimately better, faster treatment outcomes.

name: Behaivior
description:
Behaivior's Recovery(tm) platform uses AI and wearables to predict high-risk events and enable proactive, personalized recovery interventions. 
 Behaivior revolutionizes healthcare and well-being, making support accessible and reducing healthcare costs. Our award-winning platform, Recovery(tm), enhances patient engagement and outcomes, supports crisis intervention, and eases staff burden. We ensure our solutions reach everyone, seamlessly integrating into current care ecosystems.

name: AidRx
